privileged_info_summary: The task metadata describes 8 Premium Canvas Tote product variants in a Canvas Bags category with synthetic data. The category name and SKU prefix (PCT-) do not exist in the environment's products.csv file. However, the pricing structure is realistic: small tote at $18.99 retail (matches real Etsy listings), medium at $24.99 (exact Etsy match), large at $32.99 (exact Etsy match), and XLarge at $39.99 (matches Amazon/retail listings). The wholesale costs ($8.50-$17.00) are plausible distributor-level pricing. The product size variants (small, medium, large, XLarge) and color options (natural, black) are authentic for real canvas tote bags. The inventory stock levels (25, 25, 30, 30, 20, 20, 15, 15) are synthetic task-specific data. The environment uses NCH Copper Point of Sale v3.06 and the task requires manual data entry of these 8 product variants.
